MessageStrip.text: Mock shell — OData binding and auth wiring come next with your go-ahead.
Select a row, then Test connection or Sync tools (mock updates health / last sync). Wide tables scroll horizontally below.
Filters combine with AND. Search matches tool or MCP server name (also AND with dropdowns).
Search AND status AND model AND dept gate — all active filters narrow the list together.
Filters use AND logic. Add mapping opens a dialog to pick Agent → MCP server → tool from that server.
Wide: parameters and chat side-by-side. Narrow (under ~960px): use System parameters and Chat tabs. Same contract as Chat UI after wiring.

TextArea.placeholder: Type a test message (mock UI only)…
Type a test message (mock UI only)…

MessageStrip.text: Filters use AND. New group / Edit claims open dialogs (mock save via toast).

Text.text: Pick MCP server first; the tool list shows tools for that server.
